meta.title: Kutsitsa Makanema - Tsitsa Makanema a Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Tsitsa makanema kuchokera ku Instagram, YouTube ndi Facebook kwaulere. Palibe app yofunikira. Mwachangu ndi mosavuta.

hero.title: Chotsitsa Makanema a Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Tsitsa Instagram Reels, Facebook ndi YouTube makanema mwamsanga. Kwaulere, mwachangu, palibe app yofunikira.
hero.placeholder: Yikani apa ulalo wa kanema wanu...

howto.title: Mmene Mutsitsira Makanema
howto.step1_desc: Tsegulan Instagram, YouTube kapena Facebook ndikopiyani ulalo wa kanema.
howto.step2_desc: Yikani ulalo mu bokosi pamwamba ndikudina batani la Kutsitsa.
howto.step3_desc: Sankhani ubwino ofuna ndikusunga kanema pazida yanu.

result.title: Kanema Wanu Wakhala Wokonzeka!
result.error: Sinapeze kanema. Chonde onani ulalo ndikuyesanso.
result.invalid_url: Chonde lowetsani ulalo woona wa Instagram, TikTok, Facebook kapena YouTube.

faq.title: Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri
faq.a1: Inde, kwaulere kwa konse. Palibe cholembetsa kapena app yofunikira.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Zolemba, Stories), YouTube (Makanema, Shorts), ndi Facebook (Makanema, Reels).
faq.a3: Inde. Sitisungirako maulalo anu kapena makanema. Zonse zimachitidwa nthawi yeniyeni.
faq.a4: Ayi. Makanema a anthu okha amatha kutsitsidwa.

trending.title: Makanema Abwino Kwambiri Mulungu Uno
trending.subtitle: Dinani kuona pa YouTube • kopiyani ulalo kutsitsa

footer.tagline: Kutsitsa makanema mwachangu ndi kwaulere kuchokera ku malo amene mukonda.
footer.disclaimer: Chida ichi ndi chagwiritsa ntchito wokha wokha. Chonde lemekezani malamulo a ufulu wa zolemba.
